vec_UnalignedArray Struct Reference
[Unaligned Data Access]

An object corresponding to an unaligned array of uint64_t. More...

#include <vec_ops.h>


Data Fields

vec_UnalignedPointer ptr
uint64_t val0
uint64_t val1

Detailed Description

An object corresponding to an unaligned array of uint64_t.

This supports the operation of efficiently fetching the next value in a streaming fashion.

Examples:

Unaligned_Data_Access.

Field Documentation

vec_UnalignedPointer vec_UnalignedArray::ptr

The raw pointer to memory.

uint64_t vec_UnalignedArray::val0

value from software-pipelined prefetching.

uint64_t vec_UnalignedArray::val1

value from software-pipelined prefetching.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
  • vec_ops.h
